name: XFlight: FPV Drone Simulator
short_description: A top-notch FPV simulator with excellent control feel and a wealth of engaging content.
detailed_description:
《XFlight Club》: A Home for Beginners

Your FPV journey starts here on a smooth, guided, and proven path.

Getting started is the Hardest Part. We Fix That

Many of us dream of that kind of aerial freedom but don't know where to begin. 《XFlight Club》 is your starting point.

A Proven Path to the Sky

Thousands of new pilots have begun their journey here by design. They succeeded thanks to our integrated learning system—not just lessons, but a complete, structured path. This is what we built and what other simulators lack.

How? It Starts With a System

36 lessons. From sticks to sky. No prior knowledge or coach is required, Follow the structured guidance to build the muscle memory and intuition needed for real flight. That’s the goal.

The result? The ability to confidently take control of a real FPV drone.

Go Beyond the Sim: Regular Video Guides

Deepen your training with video. Our Bilibili channel (for Chinese users) is regularly updated with free, in-depth tutorials. (Our English YouTube library is actively growing!)

Each video is tied directly to in-game challenges. Watch, then instantly practice in the sim. This direct feedback loop is the fastest way to improve.

《XFlight Club》: A Playground for Aces

Enter a living world of challenges, constantly evolving.

Find Your Next Challenge

For the experienced pilot, this is where the real test begins. Hundreds of community-built levels await, each crafted to meet a specific goal:

  • Race Tracks: Tackle perfect replicas of world-famous competitive circuits.

  • Specialized Training: Master advanced maneuvers with guided video tutorials.

  • Fun & Games: Play unique mini-games that sharpen your control in unexpected ways.

    A Track Library That Never Stops Growing

    • Always Current: The track library evolves with the competitive season, giving you authentic practice for the world's biggest events.

    • Your Idea, Created: Have a dream track? Submit a concept! Our dedicated builders can help bring it to life.

    More Than a Simulator: A Living FPV Community

    This is a creator-driven community at its core. Every update brings fresh surprises, inspired directly by the pilots who fly here. Built by pilots, for pilots.

    Fly Your Way. Then Share It

    Your personal configurations and creations are meant to be shared.

    With one-click sharing and data as a universal language, collaborating with the global community is effortless. This is the open XFlight Club ecosystem.

    Your Tune，Shared in a Click

    Capture your ideal aircraft physics or transmitter rates in a shareable code. One click generates it, a quick paste lets any friend fly with your exact feel.

Bridge the Gap to Real Flight

Translate your physical drone into the simulator. By importing real measurements to practice with a model that matches your real quad’s behavior, closing the loop between simulation and reality.

Learn From the Best

  • Stuck? Load a top pilot’s setup with one click to understand their approach.

  • Create? Share your own XLab creations the same way. Feed your creativity back into the ecosystem.

The XLab: Build Everything

Unleash your ideas. Craft unique tracks, games, and challenges with our intuitive editor. Share them with the world.

Your Creative Hub

This built-in editor is where every flight challenge in the simulator begins. More than a track editor，it’s a powerful toolkit for building your own games and worlds.

Build Like a Pro, Easy as Blocks

Our unique component-based system packages advanced logic into simple, snap-together modules.

Just drag, drop, and connect to:

  • Craft intense race tracks with custom layouts and obstacles.

  • Design focused training drills for specific skills.

  • Invent fun FPV mini-games with unique rules and goals.

From Imagination to Reality, in Minutes

Got an idea? Build it. Whether it’s a replica of a famous spot or a flight fantasy born from pure imagination, the XLab makes it playable.

When you’re done, share your creation with one click—it instantly becomes part of the community.

This is where players become creators, and every pilot’s vision takes flight.
